title: prostanthera suborbicularis
intro: Prostanthera suborbicularis, also known as the Spreading Prostanthera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prostanthera suborbicularis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Prostanthera suborbicularis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and stems.
